CustomField.formula:
IF(flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c ='datepicker', 'input-date', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c ='datetime', 'input-datetime', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c ='textarea', 'inputRichText', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c ='message', 'input-text', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c ='gh-epic-label', 'input-text', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c ='multiselect', 'dualListbox', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c ='radiobuttons', 'radioGroup', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c ='labels', 'select', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c ='multicheckboxes', 'checkboxGroup', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c ='select','select', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaCustomType__c ='multiuserpicker', 'checkboxGroup',
IF(flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'components', 'select', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'versions', 'select', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'labels', 'select', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'fixVersions', 'select', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'summary', 'input-text', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'reporter', 'select', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'priority', 'select', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'environment', 'input-text', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'duedate', 'input-date', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'description', 'inputRichText', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'assignee','select', IF(flosum_connect__ShemaSystem__c = 'parent', 'issueLink',
'' )))))))))))))))))))))))
CustomField.label: SF Input
